mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TW_TREE (HOSP_CD, TAB_ID, GRP_CD, NODE_ID, PARENT_ID, NODE_NM, NODE_DESC, SORT_ORD, USE_YN) VALUES (#{hospCd}, #{tabId}, #{grpCd}, #{nodeId}, #{parentId}, #{nodeNm}, #{nodeDesc}, #{sortOrd}, 'Y')
INSERT INTO TW_FORM_D (HOSP_CD, FORM_CD, SEC_CD, ITEM_SEQ, ITEM_NM, ITEM_DESC, USE_YN) VALUES (#{hospCd}, #{formCd}, #{secCd}, #{itemSeq}, #{itemNm}, #{itemDesc}, 'Y')
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TW_QPS WHERE HOSP_CD = #{hospCd} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY QPS_CD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TW_QPS (HOSP_CD, QPS_CD, QPS_NM, NOTE, USE_YN, REG_USER) VALUES (#{hospCd}, #{qpsCd}, #{qpsNm}, #{note}, 'Y', #{regUser})
mapper.select:
SELECT REF_CD, MIN(NOTE) AS REF_NM, COUNT(*) AS CODE_CNT FROM TW_REF WHERE HOSP_CD = #{hospCd} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
AND REF_CD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{refCd}, '%')
GROUP BY REF_CD ORDER BY REF_CD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TW_REF (HOSP_CD, REF_CD, REF_SEQ, REF_VAL, NOTE, USE_YN, REG_DT, REG_USER) VALUES (#{hospCd}, #{refCd}, #{refSeq}, #{refVal}, #{note}, 'Y', NOW(), #{regUser})
